title: nepeta calycina
intro: Nepeta calycina, also known as Spurred Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Nepeta calycina have been found to provide relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health and stress relief. In herbal preparations, Nepeta calycina is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
